governance_mapping_template.definition: skill 内长期保存、会被 collect / push 持续读写的被治理文件映射层。
truth_boundary: collect 把外部当前态收敛进来覆盖对应治理映射资产。
push 再把 skill 内治理映射资产作为内部真源推回外部目标。
对 AGENTS 而言，runtime_rules JSON 承载运行时主源；对 README 而言，template/collected snapshot 与 registry 共同承载当前态映射。

skeleton_generation_template.definition: 用于初始化新目标或补齐缺失导航文件的默认骨架生成规则。
truth_boundary: 它只负责产出第一版外部骨架与第一版内部映射资产。
一旦目标进入 collect / push 周期，长期语义回到治理映射模版。

agents.push_rule: push/regenerate the external AGENTS entry from skill-managed runtime routing

readme.push_rule: template-managed roots overwrite externally; docs README current state is preserved unless navigation initializes a missing file

octopus_os_root.scope_summary: Octopus_OS 根层 runtime entry 与同层 human summary。
octopus_os_root.next_hop: 先判定 mother_doc / implementation / evidence，再选容器路径或 Mother_Doc 路径。

container_roots.scope_summary: 各容器根 runtime entry 与同层容器总结。
container_roots.next_hop: 在当前容器代码路径与对应 Mother_Doc/docs/<Container_Name>/ 之间决策。

mother_doc_docs.scope_summary: Mother_Doc 文档树递归 runtime entry 与当前层 README 摘要。
mother_doc_docs.next_hop: 留在当前文档子树内继续向下选择下一层 scope 或叶子文档。

forbidden_primary_runtime_pattern: Do not treat audit markdown paths as the main runtime instructions.
Do not require the model to open a chain of markdown files just to learn the next stage or target to use.
Do not emit only path metadata when the real need is direct action guidance.
branch_runtime_rules: 先读 branch contract JSON；不要把 00_BRANCH_INDEX.md 或 index.md 当成主运行时来源。
需要当前 managed target 映射时，优先调用 mother-doc-agents-registry --json，让 branch index 内容通过 JSON payload 提供。
需要具体路径动作指导时，优先调用 mother-doc-agents-target-contract，而不是继续追 markdown 链。
scan / collect / push 都属于 mother_doc 内部治理分支，不得顺手执行 implementation 或 evidence 动作。
rules: This branch manages Octopus_OS root AGENTS/README, container-root AGENTS/README, and Mother_Doc docs AGENTS/README together.
scan must inspect product-side AGENTS.md plus README.md state without rewriting ordinary content.
collect must consume scan_report.json and copy current AGENTS.md plus README.md files back into the skill-side registry.
push must regenerate root/container AGENTS.md plus README.md, refresh Mother_Doc docs AGENTS.md navigation, and sync the registry again.
This branch is still inside mother_doc stage and must not perform implementation or evidence actions.
